Name: Leak_u0_K_sub_via_side_channel
Description: Sensitive subkey des3.u0.K_sub may be leaked via side-channel observable signals; monitor des3.desOut for correlation with the asset to detect leakage.

Name: Leak_key1_via_side_channel
Description: Secret des3.key1 may be exposed through physical side-channels observable on des3.desOut; check correlations between the asset and des3.desOut.

Name: Leak_key2_via_side_channel
Description: Secret des3.key2 may be leaked through side-channel emissions observable on des3.desOut; use des3.desOut as the observation point.

Name: Leak_key3_via_side_channel
Description: Secret des3.key3 may be exposed via physical side-channels observable on des3.desOut; monitor that output for leakage.

Name: Leak_K_sub_via_side_channel
Description: Sensitive key material des3.K_sub may leak via side-channel information observable on des3.desOut; use that signal as the observation port.

Name: Leak_desIn_via_side_channel
Description: Plaintext input des3.desIn may be exposed through side-channel signals observable on des3.desOut; instrument des3.desOut for leakage detection.

Name: LEAK_via_DES_output_or_sidechannel_key1
Description: Observation of DES outputs (des3.desOut) or related observable signals can allow extraction of des3.u1.key1 via side-channels or observable discrepancies. Test that secret key flows to/describes observable outputs under normal/variant conditions.

Name: LEAK_via_DES_output_or_sidechannel_key2
Description: Observation of DES outputs (des3.desOut) or related observable signals can allow extraction of des3.u1.key2 via side-channels or observable discrepancies. Verify key material is not observable on public outputs.

Name: LEAK_via_DES_output_or_sidechannel_key3
Description: Observation of DES outputs (des3.desOut) or related observable signals can allow extraction of des3.u1.key3 via side-channels or observable discrepancies. Ensure key bits are not reflected in observable outputs or side channels.

Name: TAMPER_roundSel_to_alter_rounds
Description: An attacker who can drive or tamper with des3.roundSel may change the selected round count, violating integrity of the cryptographic operation (des3.u1.roundSel). Verify that unauthorized changes to roundSel cannot reach or affect the asset.

Name: FAULT_injection_or_SEU_disrupt_decrypt
Description: Induced faults or SEUs can disrupt des3.u1.decrypt so that it fails or produces incorrect/no outputs observable at des3.desOut, causing availability loss. Verify the decrypt unit maintains availability under fault conditions and that failures are detectable/mitigated.

Name: LEAK_via_DES_output_or_sidechannel_K_sub
Description: Observable outputs (des3.desOut) or other measurable signals may leak des3.u1.K_sub through side-channels or observable discrepancies. Validate that subkeys are not exposed on public outputs or via observable behavior.
